title: High stakes battle in Kadwa as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Kadwa. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Kadwa assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Kadwa show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Women voters of Kadwa demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Kadwa has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Kadwa assembly segment.

snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Kadwa, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
